topic: My car stalls every time I try to drive past one particular house on my street.
title: My Car Stalls At The Same House Every Time | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My car stalled every single time I tried to pass one house on my street.
scenes.image_prompt: a stalled car at the curb in front of a dark house at dusk, dim porch light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is an ordinary house. Grey shutters, empty driveway.
scenes.image_prompt: a plain two story suburban house with grey shutters, overcast sky, no cars, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every other house, the engine ran fine.
scenes.image_prompt: a car driving smoothly down a quiet residential street, soft evening light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At that one address, the engine always died at the mailbox.
scenes.image_prompt: a rusted mailbox in front of a dark house, a stalled car beside it, dim streetlamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The radio would whisper my name.
scenes.image_prompt: a car dashboard radio glowing faintly in a dark cabin, static on the display, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A mechanic found nothing wrong. The car restarted past the property line.
scenes.image_prompt: an open car hood at a repair garage, work lamp, oil stains, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I knocked on the door.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark front door of an old house, peeling paint, dim porch light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No one answered. But the curtain moved.
scenes.image_prompt: a window with a thin curtain pulled slightly aside, darkness behind the glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A neighbor told me the house had burned down years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: an old faded photograph of a charred house ruin, held in a hand, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night my car stalled, and every door locked on its own.
scenes.image_prompt: a car interior at night, door lock buttons down, dark house looming through the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take the long way around now. It takes an extra hour.
scenes.image_prompt: a long winding road leaving a neighborhood at dusk, headlights, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the grey shutters appeared on my own house.
scenes.image_prompt: a suburban house at dawn with fresh grey shutters that do not match the trim, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
